summary: Basit bir uygulamada mod fikirleri tasarlayıp görüntülemeye yönelik yeni proje.

existing_features.title: Create a frontend page that lets users design a mod idea using a form with fields: Title, Description, Game/Platform, Tags (comma-separated input that becomes a list). On submit, save the idea via the backend and show success/error feedback.

Create a frontend list view that displays all created mod ideas with basic filtering and viewing: show Title, Game/Platform, Tags, Created date, and a truncated Description preview; allow expanding/collapsing each item to read the full description.
Use React Query for fetching and mutations for mod ideas, including cache invalidation after creating a new idea so the list updates immediately without a manual refresh.

Apply a coherent, creative visual theme across the app (colors, typography, spacing, and components) suitable for a "mod workshop" concept, avoiding default/plain styling. Use Tailwind + shadcn composition and keep the theme consistent across form, list, and empty/loading states.

new_feature_requests.summary: Implement backend data storage and APIs for mod ideas: allow creating a mod idea and listing all created mod ideas (persisted in canister stable state). Each mod idea must include: id, title, description, game/platform, tags (list of strings), createdAt timestamp, and author principal (if available).

projectName: Mod Idea Designer: Create and List Mod Concepts
